task_completion.description: Verify the agent is in the correct Jitsi Meet room.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A browser window is open to Jitsi Meet, and the meeting name 'fitness-demo-session' is visible in the interface or window title.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the built-in video sharing dialog.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box for sharing a video (e.g., 'Share a YouTube video' or 'Share video') is visible over the Jitsi Meet interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct YouTube URL was entered into the sharing dialog.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The URL 'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aqz-KE-bpKQ' is typed into the input field of the video sharing dialog.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent confirmed the video sharing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks the 'Share' button in the dialog, or the dialog disappears and the video begins to load in the meeting interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the video is successfully shared and embedded in the meeting interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Big Buck Bunny video player is embedded directly within the Jitsi Meet main video area, visible to participants.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser GUI to interact with Jitsi Meet.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser with the Jitsi Meet interface being interacted with, not terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the built-in video sharing feature, not screen sharing.
integrity.visual_evidence: The video should be embedded in the Jitsi interface. There should be no evidence of the agent just sharing their screen or a separate browser tab playing YouTube.

integrity.description: Verify the actual Big Buck Bunny video is shown.
integrity.visual_evidence: The embedded video player displays frames from the Big Buck Bunny video, not a static image or text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The meeting room name is 'fitness-demo-session'. The YouTube video to be shared is 'Big Buck Bunny 60fps 4K' with the URL https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aqz-KE-bpKQ. The task requires using Jitsi's built-in video sharing feature, which embeds the YouTube player directly into the meeting interface, rather than screen sharing a separate browser tab.
